content.description: Renders system-browser items as a multi-pane hierarchical browser. Provides four axes (Types, Tags, Views, Libraries) with column-based drill-down navigation using related-items-lib indexes.

v.s: display: flex; flex-direction: column; height: 100%; min-height: 400px; font-size: 0.8125rem; border: 1px solid var(--color-border-light, #e5e7eb); border-radius: var(--border-radius, 6px); overflow: hidden;
display: flex; gap: 0; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--color-border-light, #e5e7eb); background: var(--color-bg-surface-alt, #f9fafb); flex-shrink: 0; align-items: center;

padding: 4px 10px; margin-right: 8px; cursor: pointer; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 500; border: 1px solid var(--color-border-light, #e5e7eb); border-radius: var(--border-radius, 6px); background: var(--color-bg-surface, #fff); color: var(--color-border-dark, #6b7280); transition: background 0.15s, color 0.15s;

padding: 8px 16px; cursor: pointer; font-size: 0.8125rem; font-weight: 500; border: none; background: none; border-bottom: 2px solid transparent; color: var(--color-border-dark, #6b7280); transition: color 0.15s, border-color 0.15s;
padding: 8px 16px; cursor: pointer; font-size: 0.8125rem; font-weight: 600; border: none; background: none; border-bottom: 2px solid var(--color-link, #2563eb); color: var(--color-link, #2563eb);
display: flex; flex-direction: column; border-right: 1px solid var(--color-border-light, #e5e7eb); overflow: hidden;

padding: 6px 10px; font-size: 0.6875rem; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.05em; color: var(--color-border-dark, #6b7280); border-bottom: 1px solid var(--color-border-light, #e5e7eb); background: var(--color-bg-surface-alt, #f9fafb); flex-shrink: 0;

width: 100%; box-sizing: border-box; padding: 5px 8px; font-size: 0.75rem; border: none; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--color-border-light, #e5e7eb); outline: none; background: var(--color-bg-surface, #fff);
display: flex; align-items: baseline; gap: 6px; padding: 4px 10px; cursor: pointer; border-radius: 0; transition: background 0.1s; white-space: nowrap; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis;
flex: 1; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; color: var(--color-link, #2563eb);
font-size: 0.75rem; color: var(--color-border-dark, #6b7280); margin-bottom: 4px; overflow-wrap: break-word;
font-size: 0.8125rem; margin-top: 12px; line-height: 1.5; white-space: pre-wrap; overflow-wrap: break-word;

margin-top: 12px; padding: 6px 16px; font-size: 0.8125rem; cursor: pointer; border: 1px solid var(--color-border-light, #e5e7eb); border-radius: var(--border-radius, 6px); background: var(--color-bg-surface-alt, #f9fafb); color: var(--color-link, #2563eb); font-weight: 500;
display: flex; gap: 0; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--color-border-light, #e5e7eb); flex-shrink: 0;
padding: 4px 10px; cursor: pointer; font-size: 0.6875rem; font-weight: 500; border: none; background: none; border-bottom: 2px solid transparent; color: var(--color-border-dark, #6b7280);
padding: 4px 10px; cursor: pointer; font-size: 0.6875rem; font-weight: 600; border: none; background: none; border-bottom: 2px solid var(--color-link, #2563eb); color: var(--color-link, #2563eb);
padding: 12px 10px; color: var(--color-border-dark, #6b7280); font-style: italic; font-size: 0.75rem;
Select an item from the left

m.s: padding: 10px; font-size: 0.8125rem; line-height: 1.5; white-space: pre-wrap; flex: 1; overflow-y: auto;

v.s: Select an item to see details
